description_long: This is a modern, rectangular open-shelf unit with rounded corners and a smooth, continuous surface. The main body is a single, seamless piece with a large open compartment, ideal for storing or displaying items. The exterior is finished in a muted beige or light olive color, giving it a contemporary and neutral appearance suitable for urban environments. The shelf stands on four short, cylindrical wooden legs that slightly angle outward, providing stability and a subtle contrast in material and color. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, making it versatile for use as a low cabinet, media console, or display shelf. Its minimalist aesthetic and lack of visible hardware or ornamentation emphasize functionality and modern style.
description: A modern, open rectangular shelf unit with rounded corners, a smooth beige finish, and four short wooden legs. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open compartment, rounded corners, and two visible wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved, seamless side profile and the depth of the open compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the open compartment and two wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same curved profile and leg placement.
